sizing_rule.note: Dynamic optimal f recalculates position size periodically based on current equity and updated maximum drawdown, rather than static initial calculation. Superior to fixed fractional f for extended time horizons (125+ days). Specific optimal_f percentage not provided in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Use dynamic fractional f strategy instead of static fractional f to achieve superior long-term wealth accumulation, as the dynamic approach provides asymptotically greater returns over extended time horizons.
